items.title: Late Call-In / Attendance Discipline (intake prompts)
items.answer: Collect: scheduled start time, actual call time, who was called, whether sick code used, prior occurrences, written discipline, and what standard management claims.

items.title: Investigation / disciplinary meeting (representation + deadlines intake)
items.answer: Collect: date/time of meeting notice, exact allegations, whether rep requested/denied, any written notice, and who attended.

items.title: Safety / Incident / ARC (intake prompts)
items.answer: Collect: route, bus number, speed, conditions, video existence, what mitigation was taken, ARC process steps, and what documents were shown.
